differences.title: 1. PERFORMANCE
differences.leftDesc: Built for speed using ASGI, leverages type hints for async.
differences.rightDesc: Mature and stable, suitable for many applications.

differences.title: 2. ASYNC SUPPORT
differences.leftDesc: Designed from ground up for asynchronous operations.
differences.rightDesc: Primarily synchronous, async support added later.

differences.title: 3. TYPE HINTS
differences.leftDesc: Leverages Python type hints for better validation and IDE support.
differences.rightDesc: Relies on runtime checks and duck typing.

differences.title: 4. DATA VALIDATION
differences.leftDesc: Integrated validation with Pydantic for request/response bodies.
differences.rightDesc: Requires extensions like Marshmallow or WTForms.

differences.title: 5. API DOCUMENTATION
differences.leftDesc: Automatic interactive API docs (Swagger UI, ReDoc) out-of-the-box.
differences.rightDesc: Documentation typically written manually or with extensions.

differences.title: 6. COMMUNITY SIZE
differences.leftDesc: Rapidly expanding with strong interest and contributions.
differences.rightDesc: Vast, mature community with extensive resources.

differences.title: 7. CONFIGURATION
differences.leftDesc: Configuration managed via settings files and environment variables.
differences.rightDesc: Highly flexible, configuration can be set in various ways.
